parameter_descriptions.evasion_offset_m: Horizontal distance (m) from ownship to the virtual waypoint used for reactive avoidance when a DAIDALUS NONE heading band is available.
parameter_descriptions.evasion_duration_s: Minimum time (s) before the reactive virtual target may be recomputed; reduces steering chatter.
parameter_descriptions.heading_blend: Interpolates between the lower edge of the NONE band (0) and its circular midpoint (1) to pick the blended safe heading.
parameter_descriptions.track_mix: Weight (0..1) to mix the DAIDALUS safe horizontal direction with the bearing to the next route waypoint; higher favors staying on the mission leg.
parameter_descriptions.cpp_distance_filter_m: Passed to NASA DAIDALUS C++ setDistanceFilter (m). Traffic beyond this range may be ignored. Use 0 for library default (no artificial cap).
parameter_descriptions.cpp_lookahead_s: Passed to setLookaheadTime (s). Horizons for conflict detection; use 0 for library default.
parameter_descriptions.cpp_horizontal_nmac_m: Passed to setHorizontalNMAC (m). Near-miss horizontal threshold in the C++ core; use 0 for library default.
parameter_descriptions.daa_interval_s: Wall-clock period (s) between full pairwise DAIDALUS evaluations in the simulator; lower is more responsive but more CPU.
parameter_descriptions.min_alert_level: Reactive steering engages only when DAIDALUS alert level for the intruder is at least this (1=corrective, 2=warning, 3=preventive per DO-365B-style scale).
parameter_descriptions.max_cross_track_m: After choosing an avoidance target, clamp it horizontally so it stays within this distance (m) of the active flight-plan leg in XZ; 0 disables clamping.
parameter_descriptions.final_approach_no_reactive_radius_m: On the last leg only: if horizontally within this radius (m) of the final waypoint, disable DAIDALUS reactive targets so drones can land instead of orbiting.
parameter_descriptions.daa_intruder_eval_mode: pairwise = one C++ DAIDALUS solve per neighbor pair (legacy); multi = one solve per ownship with up to 32 closest intruders as traffic (combined alertLevelAllTraffic and horizontal bands).
